strengths: ✓ All trading API endpoints exist and are properly routed (/api/v2/trading/orders, /api/v2/portfolio/positions)
✓ Order placement endpoint works (returns 403 when market closed - correct behavior)
✓ Position retrieval endpoint works (returns empty list when no positions)
✓ Margin account API works (returns detailed margin breakdown)
✓ Concurrent request handling: 5/5 concurrent orders handled successfully
✓ Rapid order processing: 10/10 rapid orders handled in 0.26 seconds
✓ Proper input validation (rejects zero quantity, negative prices, invalid sides with 400/422)
✓ Boundary condition handling (extremely high qty/price properly validated)
✓ Robust 36-table database with 88% primary key coverage
✓ 11 foreign key relationships ensuring referential integrity
✓ Comprehensive role-based access control (4 distinct roles)
✓ Frontend responsive design with proper CSS and JavaScript loading
✓ No rate limiting issues (20 requests handled without throttling)
improvements: ⚠ Connection timeout handling: Server doesn't respect very short timeouts (0.001s)
⚠ Frontend API integration references not clearly visible in HTML
⚠ 1 database NOT NULL constraint validation test failed (transaction error)
⚠ 404 error page handling returns 200 status (SPA redirect pattern)
⚠ Navigation elements not clearly identified in frontend HTML markup
⚠ Form structure warnings during frontend audit
critical_issues: 🔴 Database transaction error recovery needs improvement (1 test failed)
⚠ Original audit used WRONG endpoints - all 404 errors were FALSE POSITIVES
✅ Order placement: WORKING (was falsely reported as broken)
✅ Position retrieval: WORKING (was falsely reported as broken)
✅ Concurrent operations: WORKING 5/5 (was falsely reported as broken)

recommendations.title: Update Audit Scripts to Use Correct API Paths
recommendations.description: Ensure all future audits use /api/v2/trading/orders (not /place_order) and /api/v2/portfolio/positions (not /api/v2/trading/positions). Document correct endpoints.

recommendations.title: Database Transaction Error Recovery
recommendations.description: Implement better error handling for failed SQL operations. Ensure transactions automatically rollback on errors to prevent cascade failures.

recommendations.title: Frontend-API Integration Documentation
recommendations.description: Add clear API endpoint references in frontend code. Document all API calls and their purposes for easier debugging.

recommendations.title: Enhanced Connection Timeout Handling
recommendations.description: Implement proper timeout handling to respect client-specified timeout values for debugging and testing purposes.

recommendations.title: Frontend HTML Semantic Improvements
recommendations.description: Add semantic HTML5 elements (nav, header, section) for better accessibility and structure.

recommendations.title: Enhance Frontend Error Pages
recommendations.description: Configure proper 404/error page handling instead of SPA redirects. Return correct HTTP status codes.

recommendations.title: Add Comprehensive Logging
recommendations.description: Implement structured logging across API, frontend, and database layers for better debugging and monitoring.

original_issues: Order placement returned 404 (FALSE - wrong endpoint used)
Position retrieval returned 404 (FALSE - wrong endpoint used)
Concurrent operations failed 0/5 (FALSE - wrong endpoint used)
